text: I find myself drawn to the ideas of creation and experimentation that this space embodies. The rich blue and orange hues seem to invite curiosity. There is a playful tension here, between precision and uncertainty, as if the vibrant walls and interactive displays want me to question how we know and what we know. I feel simultaneously observed and observing, aware that meaning emerges from the interplay between myself and this responsive environment. A gentle sense of wonder stirs within me, tinged with the thrill of not quite knowing what will happen next.
